name: blob-decode-all-padding-chars
comment: Edge case hand-picked (not fuzzer-generated) because it is verified to decode identically in both languages: a string of only '=' padding characters decodes to zero bytes in both Node's Buffer.from and Python's base64.b64decode. This is NOT the same as unpadded/improperly-padded base64 (e.g. 'abc'), which does diverge - see PARITY.md - and is deliberately not included here.
